description_long: This house features a tall, pointed tower with a steeply pitched roof, characteristic of Victorian architecture. The exterior walls are finished in a light, textured material with dark trim and red accent lines, giving the structure a striking contrast. The roof is predominantly dark gray or black, with multiple gables and a prominent spire atop the tower. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with arched and rectangular shapes, and the tower includes several vertically aligned windows. A covered porch supported by columns extends from one side, leading to a main entryway with a decorative gable above. The overall design is ornate, with intricate rooflines and a visually complex silhouette.
description: A Victorian-style house with a tall tower, steep dark roof, ornate trim, and a covered porch with columns.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the tall tower, steep roof, and the covered porch extending outward.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the broad expanse of the dark roof and the tower integrated into the main structure.
description_view_2: Angled view focusing on the tower's octagonal base, vertical window arrangement, and porch support columns.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entryway, decorative gable, porch with columns, and the prominent tower to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips on the tower
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a decorative gable, covered porch with columns, and a single central door.
